title: Vehicle interior component
abstract: A vehicle interior component is disclosed. The component may comprise a base and a core comprising a core structure. The core may provide functional features such as resilience, passage of illumination and/or passage of air flow. The core structure may comprise a framework of resilient elements, a matrix of projections or spring members/elements, a lattice, a set of sheets, curved sheets, a set of layers, a multi-layer framework, etc.; the core structure may comprise any of a variety of forms (including composite forms) configured to provide intended overall and/or localized variation in physical properties for the component (e.g. comfort/feel, resilience/compressibility, rigidity/stiffness, strength, mass/weight, shape/form, fit, manufacturability/assembly, material properties/selection, light-transmissibility/translucence, air/scent flow, ornamental effect/appearance, etc.). The core may be configured for efficient production by additive manufacturing processes and/or thermoforming, molding, etc. The component may comprise a console, panel, occupant support, etc.
claims: Claims CLAIMS The invention claimed is: 1. A vehicle interior component comprising: a base structure; and a core comprising a core structure; wherein the core structure is configured to provide at least one functional property comprising at least one of (a) structural resilience; (b) flexibility; (c) facilitation of light transmission; (d) facilitation of air flow; (e) facilitation of scent dispersion; (f) presentation of a surface effect; (g) presentation of a visual effect. 2. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a structure formed by additive manufacturing. 3. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a semi-rigid integrally-formed plastic material. 4. The component of Claim 1 further comprising a cover integrally formed on the core structure. 5. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises at least one of (1) a lattice structure; (2) an open lattice structure; (3) a layered structure; (4) a matrix; (5) a structure of resilient elements; (6) a lattice of resilient elements; (7) a set of projections. 6. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a composite structure. 7. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises at least one of (1) an integrally-formed core; (2) an integrally-formed structure; (3) a formed core structure; (4) a formed structure; (5) a set of spring elements. 8. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises a light-transmissive material and a generally opaque material. 9. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a flexible structural core. 10. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a thermoformed structure. 11. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises at least one of (a) a set of resilient elements; (b) a framework of resilient elements. 37 12. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises at least one of (a) a lattice; (b) an open lattice; (c) a lattice configured to provide resilience. 13. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a layered structure. 14. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core further comprises a frame. 15. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises a composite of multiple materials. 16. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises a multi-segment core. 17. The component of Claim 16 wherein the multi- segment core comprises a segment of a first material and a segment of a second material. 18. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises a first segment and a second segment; wherein the first segment comprises a first material providing a first functional property; wherein the second segment comprises a second material providing a second functional property. 19. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core is configured to provide variable stiffness. 20. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises a layered structure; wherein the layered structure comprises a first non-planar layer coupled to a second non- planar layer. 21. The component of Claim 20 wherein the first non-planar layer comprises a set of voids. 22. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core structure comprises a framework configured to provide passages for at least one of air flow and/or illumination. 23. The component of Claim 1 further comprising a cover on the core structure. 24. The component of Claim 23 further comprising a light source configured to pass illumination through the core structure to the cover. 25. The component of Claim 24 wherein the light source is coupled to the core structure through a light guide. 26. The component of Claim 24 further comprising an outlet for illumination from the core structure. 27. The component of Claim 1 further comprising a cover applied to the core structure. 38 28. The component of Claim 1 wherein the core comprises at least one of (a) polypropylene; (b) nylon; (c) filled nylon; (d) glass filled nylon; (e) resin; (f) thermoplastic resin; (g) plastic. 29. The component of Claim 1 comprising at least one of: (a) a console; (b) an overhead console; (c) a floor console; (d) a center console; (e) a door panel; (f) an armrest; (g) an occupant support. 30. A vehicle interior component comprising: a base; and a core comprising a core structure configured to perform a function; wherein the function comprises at least one of (a) resilience and/or (b) transmittance of illumination and/or (c) passage of air flow; wherein the core structure comprises (1) a formed structure; (2) a lattice structure; (3) a layered structure; (4) a matrix; (5) a structure of resilient elements; (6) a lattice of resilient elements; (7) a set of projections; (8) a set of spring elements; (9) an integrally-formed structure; (10) a structure formed by additive manufacturing; (11) a thermo-formed structure; (12) a composite structure. 31. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises an open lattice structure. 32. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a multilayered structure. 33. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a set of projections. 34. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises an open structure configured to provide structural resilience and flexibility. 35. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core is configured with a structure arrangement; wherein the structure arrangement is configured to provide functional properties; wherein functional properties of the structure arrangement comprise at least one of (a) light- transmissivity and/or (b) stiffness and/or (c) strength and/or (d) softness and/or (e) mass and/or (f) elasticity and/or (g) tensile strength and/or (h) compressive strength and/or (i) mass reduction and/or (j) strength to weight ratio. 36. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core comprises a cover integrally- formed on the core structure. 37. The component of Claim 30 further comprising a cover applied to the core structure. 38. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a framework of resilient elements. 39. The component of Claim 38 wherein the resilient elements comprise spring members. 40. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a matrix of projections; wherein the projections comprise resilient elements. 41. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a lattice comprising a set of layers. 42. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a set of sheets; wherein the sheets comprise curved sheets. 43. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a multilayer framework. 44. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a frame and an open lattice. 45. The component of Claim 30 wherein the core structure comprises a multilayer structure configured to provide passages. 46. The component of Claim 30 further comprising an inlet coupled to the passages and an outlet. 47. The component of Claim 30 further comprising a light source coupled to the core structure through a light guide; wherein the core structure comprises passages for illumination. 48. A component for a vehicle interior with a surface intended to be visible to an occupant when the component is installed in the vehicle interior comprising: (a) a base; (b) a core coupled to the base; and (c) a cover configured to cover the core and to provide the surface; wherein the core comprises at least one of (1) a lattice structure; (2) a layered structure; (3) a matrix; (4) a set of projections; (5) a set of springs. 49. The component of Claim 48 wherein the core comprises an integrally-formed core structure. 50. The component of Claim 48 wherein the core comprises a lattice structure. 51. The component of Claim 48 wherein the cover comprises a light-transmissive section. 52. The component of Claim 48 wherein the core is configured (a) to provide an outlet for light configured to provide illumination and/or (b) to direct light to provide illumination at the surface. 53. The component of Claim 52 wherein illumination is provided by a light source; wherein the light source comprises an LED arrangement. 54. The component of Claim 52 further comprising a light module configured to provide illumination at the surface; wherein the light module comprises a set of light segments. 55. The component of Claim 54 wherein the light module comprises at least one light guide. 56. The component of Claim 54 wherein the light module and the core are configured to provide at least one of (a) a light effect at the surface; (b) a shadow effect at the surface. 57. The component of Claim 54 wherein the light module and the core are configured to provide a depth effect under the cover. 58. The component of Claim 54 further comprising a support for the core; wherein the support is configured to transmit light from the light module to the core. 59. The component of Claim 58 wherein the support comprises a light diffuser. 60. The component of Claim 48 wherein the cover comprises a light-transmissive layer. 42 61. The component of Claim 48 wherein the core is configured (a) to provide an outlet for light configured to provide illumination and/or (b) to direct light to provide illumination at the surface. 43
